topic: My car drives heavier every day and the trunk is locked, and I lost the key.
title: My Trunk Gets Heavier Every Day And I Lost The Key | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My car drove heavier every day, and the trunk was locked, and I had lost the key.
scenes.image_prompt: a closed car trunk in a dim garage, single overhead bulb, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It started feeling sluggish on my morning commute.
scenes.image_prompt: a car merging onto a grey highway at dawn, overcast sky, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The back of the car sagged lower each week.
scenes.image_prompt: a sedan parked on a level street with the rear sitting noticeably low, fog, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I assumed bad shocks until I heard it shift in turns.
scenes.image_prompt: a car taking a curve on an empty road at night, headlights sweeping fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Something slid across the trunk floor.
scenes.image_prompt: the underside view of a car trunk lid, faint scratch marks, deep shadow, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I tried prying it. The lock was warm to the touch.
scenes.image_prompt: hands gripping a car trunk seam with a flat tool, dim garage lamp, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I called a locksmith for the next morning.
scenes.image_prompt: a phone glowing on a workbench beside scattered tools, dark garage, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Overnight the car sank to its axles. Something thumped twice.
scenes.image_prompt: a car sitting very low on its rear wheels in a shadowed garage, fog, dim bulb, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The locksmith arrived, touched the trunk, and walked straight back to his van.
scenes.image_prompt: a service van parked in a driveway at dawn, open back doors, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He said something inside was knocking to be let out.
scenes.image_prompt: a closed car trunk with faint dents pushing outward from inside, dim garage light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I drove it to a scrapyard and left it running.
scenes.image_prompt: a scrapyard at dusk, rows of crushed cars, a lone sedan with headlights on, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The key turned up in my pocket that night, still warm.
scenes.image_prompt: a single car key resting in an open palm under a bedside lamp, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
